notes_md:
**đảm bảo** = to make sure something happens or is true; to guarantee. It’s about removing doubt and taking responsibility for the result.

It’s a verb, often used when you promise or check carefully so something is certain. You’ll hear it in work, rules, safety, quality, and promises.


Close to **bảo đảm** (same meaning, just reversed word order). Stronger than just *chắc* (sure) because it implies action or responsibility.

translation.en: We will ensure the quality of the product.

content.sentence: Chúng tôi sẽ ___ chất lượng sản phẩm.

exampleSentences: Anh sẽ đảm bảo mọi thứ được chuẩn bị trước khi khách đến.
Chị luôn kiểm tra lại để đảm bảo công việc hoàn thành đúng hạn.
Em cần đảm bảo rằng cửa đã khóa trước khi ra ngoài.

translation.en: They will ensure safety for everyone.

content.sentence: Họ sẽ ___ an toàn cho mọi người.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I will ensure everything is prepared before the guests arrive.
She always double-checks to ensure the work is completed on time.
You need to ensure that the door is locked before going out.
notes:
đảm bảo = to make sure something happens or is true; to guarantee. It’s about removing doubt and taking responsibility for the result.

It’s a verb, often used when you promise or check carefully so something is certain. You’ll hear it in work, rules, safety, quality, and promises.

Close to bảo đảm (same meaning, just reversed word order). Stronger than just chắc (sure) because it implies action or responsibility.

example.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ đảm bảo rằng mọi thứ đều ổn.
example.en: We will ensure that everything is fine.
example.es: Nos aseguraremos de que todo esté bien.

definitions.en: To make certain that something will happen or be the case.
definitions.es: Asegurarse de que algo suceda o sea el caso.
definitions.vi: Để chắc chắn rằng một điều gì đó sẽ xảy ra hoặc đúng.
